scope_summary: AI voice assistant that handles inbound reservation calls, availability checks, booking modifications, and general inquiries for car rental operators. Connects to the operator's existing RMS for real-time fleet visibility. Available 24/7 with human transfer rules for complex situations.
modules: Human transfer rules (escalates based on complexity or operator preference)
RMS integration (reads fleet availability from existing system)

icp_overrides.weighting_notes: Carla is most valuable for operators with high inbound call volume. Multi-location operators and airport-adjacent operators are the highest priority — they have the most to gain from 24/7 coverage and call routing across locations.

criteria.label: Fleet of 25+ vehicles — sufficient call volume to justify AI voice coverage
Airport transfers, insurance replacement, van hire, or long-term lease = high inbound call volume from multiple sources
Operator with real staffing pressure — not a peer-to-peer marketplace or broker
Basic tech footprint (website, some online presence) — operator already has digital infrastructure Carla can layer onto

primary_motivators: Never miss a reservation call, especially after hours or during peak season
Reduce staffing overhead — avoid hiring extra phone staff for peak periods
Maintain service quality across multiple locations without being present at each one
Get a snapshot of call volume and conversion without listening to every recording
operations_owner.communication_style: Direct and ROI-focused. They've heard 'AI' pitches before — lead with the operational outcome, not the technology. Use specific numbers when available. First-name basis is fine.
value_props: Carla answers every call within 2 rings, 24/7, without adding headcount — reservation calls that come in at 8pm or Sunday morning are handled the same as a Tuesday afternoon walk-in.
Because Carla reads directly from your rental management system, it can confirm real availability and quote accurate rates without putting the caller on hold or calling back.
Multi-location operators can route calls intelligently — a caller asking about your airport location talks to the same Carla that knows your downtown fleet — no cross-location confusion.
When a situation needs a human, Carla transfers immediately based on your rules, so your staff handles the situations that actually need them — not every routine availability check.

objection_handles.our_customers_want_to_speak_to_a_person: Carla handles the routine calls — availability, rates, simple modifications — that customers don't actually want to wait on hold for. Complex situations and VIP customers transfer to your team instantly.
objection_handles.we_already_have_staff_for_this: The question is whether your staff want to spend their day on hold-and-answer calls, or focused on the counter and upsells. Carla handles the volume; your team handles the value.
objection_handles.will_it_work_with_our_system: Carla integrates with the major rental management platforms used in North America. We connect to your existing RMS rather than replacing it.
objection_handles.we_tried_ivr_before_and_hated_it: Carla is a conversation, not a phone tree. Callers speak naturally — 'I want to rent an SUV for three days starting Friday' — and Carla responds with real availability from your fleet.
objection_handles.what_happens_if_it_gets_it_wrong: Every call is recorded and summarized. You set the transfer rules — anything outside Carla's confidence threshold goes to a human immediately, not to a confused customer.

primary_motivators: Stop fielding repetitive availability and rate questions that interrupt counter workflow
Ensure every location answers calls consistently even when short-staffed
Get visibility into call volume and types without building a manual tracking system
operations_manager.communication_style: Process-oriented. Wants to know how Carla fits into the existing workflow, what happens on edge cases, and how the handoff to human agents works.
value_props: Carla routes calls before they hit the counter — availability checks, rate quotes, and booking modifications are handled automatically, so your team only picks up the calls that genuinely need them.
Call summaries and recordings give you a clear picture of what customers are asking, where calls are dropping, and what your team is spending time on — without reviewing every call manually.
Onboarding Carla doesn't change your RMS, your rates, or your workflow — it adds a layer on top that speaks your availability language to callers.

objection_handles.how_long_does_setup_take: Most operators are live within a week. We map your RMS data, configure your transfer rules, and run a test set before going live.
objection_handles.what_if_carla_gives_wrong_info: Carla reads from your RMS in real time — it doesn't guess. If availability isn't clear or a caller asks something outside its scope, it transfers rather than improvising.
objection_handles.who_manages_it: You set the rules once during onboarding. Ongoing changes to hours, transfer numbers, or seasonal pricing are updated in the dashboard — no IT involvement needed.

messaging_framework.elevator_pitch: Carla is an AI voice assistant built for car rental operators — it handles inbound reservation calls, availability checks, and modifications 24/7 by connecting directly to your rental management system. Operators with 2+ locations and high inbound call volume typically recover 15-25% of after-hours calls they were previously missing, without adding phone staff. It layers onto your existing RMS rather than replacing it, and goes live in under a week.
messaging_framework.category: AI voice assistant for car rental
differentiators: RMS-aware — Carla reads real fleet availability from your existing system, so it doesn't guess or put callers on hold
Built for car rental workflows — not a generic AI phone bot adapted for rentals; transfer rules, booking modification flows, and rate quoting are native
24/7 without headcount — handles after-hours and peak-volume periods that would otherwise require hiring or go unanswered
Human-in-the-loop by design — escalation rules are operator-defined, so complex or high-value calls always reach a person
proof_points: Integrated within the Valsoft / Aspire Software portfolio serving car rental operators globally
Handles reservations, modifications, availability, and general inquiries in a single call flow

email_guidance.sequence_strategy: Teach-Teach-Ask. Touch 1 opens with the operational cost of missed calls (the pain). Touch 2 explains how Carla's RMS integration makes it different from a generic IVR or answering service. Touch 3 makes a low-friction ask — 15-minute demo, no pitch deck.
email_guidance.subject_line_style: Specific and operator-language. Reference call volume, after-hours, or multi-location. Avoid hype words and 'AI-powered' in the subject.
cta_progression: Worth a 15-minute call to see how operators your size are handling after-hours reservations?
Happy to show you a short demo of how Carla reads availability from your RMS — no commitment.
If it makes sense, I can set up a pilot at one of your locations — typically live in under a week.
avoid: Leading with 'AI' in the subject line — operators are skeptical
Claiming specific ROI numbers without the prospect's data
Pitching the full product in touch 1 — lead with the missed-call pain
Generic openers like 'I hope this finds you well' or 'I wanted to reach out'
